hero_subtitle: Empowering citizens with transparent election data.
home_understand_desc: From the first announcement by the Election Commission to the final vote counting. Experience our world-class interactive timeline to see exactly how the world's largest democracy functions.
ready_voice: Ready to make your voice heard?
join_informed: Join thousands of informed citizens. Prepare for the upcoming elections with the most advanced AI civic assistant.
hero_badge: The next generation of civic participation
hero_desc: Navigate the complete election process, understand your candidates, and get personalized voting guidance in seconds with VoteWise Elite.
candidate_explorer_desc: Compare candidate promises side-by-side. Our system has summarized their manifestos so you know exactly what they stand for.
search_placeholder: Smart Search: Name, Party, Constituency, or State...
no_candidates_found: No candidates found matching your specific filters.
process_subtitle: Understand how the world's largest democracy functions, from the first announcement to the final results.
process_completed_title: You now understand how elections work!
process_completed_desc: Being an informed voter is the first step to a stronger democracy. Now that you know the process, dive into the specifics of your constituency.
evm_works_desc: An EVM consists of a Control Unit and a Balloting Unit. You press the blue button next to your chosen candidate's symbol. A red light flashes and a 'beep' confirms your vote is securely recorded.
evolution_voting_desc: Before EVMs, voters stamped a paper ballot and folded it into a ballot box. EVMs were introduced to prevent ballot stuffing, save millions of paper sheets, and speed up counting.
step1_desc: The Election Commission of India (ECI) announces the official schedule, dates, and phases for the upcoming elections. The Model Code of Conduct comes into effect immediately.
step1_bullet1: Dates for nomination filing are set.
step1_bullet2: Polling phases and counting day are declared.
step1_bullet3: Government cannot announce new schemes or projects.
step2_desc: Candidates file their nomination papers along with an affidavit (Form 26). This affidavit is a sworn statement detailing their assets, criminal records, and educational background.
step2_bullet1: Candidates must be at least 25 years old for Lok Sabha.
step2_bullet2: A security deposit must be submitted.
step2_bullet3: Voters can review affidavits to make informed choices.
step3_desc: Political parties and candidates campaign to connect with voters. Leaders engage with people through rallies, public speeches, and grassroots outreach to present their vision.
step3_bullet1: Parties present their vision through public speeches and media.
step3_bullet2: Leaders connect directly with voters across cities and villages.
step3_bullet3: Manifestos highlight promises for development and welfare.
step3_bullet4: Campaigning stops 48 hours before voting (Silence Period).
step4_desc: Citizens go to their designated polling booths to cast their secret ballot using Electronic Voting Machines (EVMs). Every vote carries equal weight.
step4_bullet1: Voters must verify their identity using Voter ID or other Govt IDs.
step4_bullet2: Indelible ink is applied to the left index finger.
step4_bullet3: EVMs record votes electronically, ensuring a fast and secure process.
step5_desc: After all phases are complete, votes are counted on a pre-determined day under strict security. The candidate with the highest number of votes in a constituency wins.
step5_bullet1: EVMs are brought to secure strong rooms.
step5_bullet2: Counting is done in the presence of candidate agents.
step5_bullet3: The winning party or coalition forms the government.
ai_assistant_desc: Your personal AI tutor for democracy. Ask questions naturally to explore candidates, timelines, and the voting process.
ai_welcome_msg: Welcome to your **Interactive Election Guide**! 🇮🇳 I'm here to make democracy easy to understand. You can ask me about the process, timelines, or specifically search for candidates by name or party (e.g., 'Who is Annamalai?' or 'Tell me about DMK candidates').
quick_reply_register: How do I register to vote?
ai_placeholder: Ask anything about the election process or search candidates...
ai_checklist_2: Keep Aadhaar or PAN Card ready.
ai_checklist_4: Go to the NVSP Portal and fill Form 6.
ai_candidate_found_msg: I found information on **{{name}}**. Here is a structured summary of their profile and manifesto:
ai_fakenews_response: Be careful of WhatsApp forwards. The Election Commission of India has strictly clarified that there is NO online voting. All voting must be done in-person using EVMs.
footer_desc: The world-class AI-powered civic-tech platform empowering citizens with transparent, accessible, and intelligent election guidance.
no_candidates: No candidates found matching your search.
process_intro: Learn about how elections work in India.
ai_welcome: Hello! I am your VoteWise AI Assistant. How can I help you today?
ai_placeholder: Ask about candidates, election process, or voting rules...
home_features_subtitle: Powerful tools designed to inform, empower, and guide you through every step of the election cycle.
feature_ai_desc: Ask complex election questions naturally. Get simple, factual answers in multiple languages.
feature_timeline_desc: Never miss a deadline. Track registration dates and voting days with our dynamic guide.
feature_candidates_desc: Compare candidate promises side-by-side. AI summarizes party manifestos into digestible points.
feature_fakenews_desc: Clarify facts instantly. Our system flags common election myths and provides verified truth.
feature_voterguide_desc: Step-by-step checklists to make your first democratic participation smooth and stress-free.
feature_locator_desc: Find your exact polling booth, wait times, and accessibility features with one click.
home_news_1: BREAKING: Voter registration deadline extended in 5 states.
home_news_2: ELECTION 2026: Youth voter turnout expected to hit record highs.
home_news_3: POLLS: Early voting numbers indicate strong participation.
home_news_4: DEBATE: Candidate town hall scheduled for next Tuesday.
home_news_5: UPDATE: New polling booth locations added to the northern district.
home_testimonials_subtitle: See how VoteWise Elite is transforming the civic experience for voters across the nation.
testimonial_1_content: The AI assistant made understanding the registration process so easy. It explained everything in simple terms.
testimonial_2_content: Comparing candidate manifestos used to take hours. Now, VoteWise Elite summarizes their core promises in seconds.
testimonial_3_content: I love the accessibility features. The large text and clear instructions helped me find my booth without stress.
guide_welcome_subtitle: Understand the complete election process, timelines, and candidates in under 60 seconds.
guide_customize_desc: Select your profile and location to get personalized data.
guide_voter_first_time_desc: I need help with registration and the basics.
guide_voter_experienced_desc: I want updates on timelines and candidates.
guide_state_label: Which State do you vote in?
guide_eligibility_desc: You need to meet basic requirements to vote in India.
guide_eligibility_q: Are you an Indian citizen aged 18 or above?
guide_eligible_msg: Awesome! You are eligible to participate in the world's largest democracy.
guide_not_eligible_msg: Currently, only Indian citizens aged 18+ can vote. You can still use this guide to learn about the process!
guide_reg_step_exp_1: Have your existing Voter ID Card ready
guide_reg_step_exp_3: Search your name in the Electoral Roll
guide_vote_step_1: Find your polling booth slip (distributed by BLO) or check online.
guide_vote_step_2: Carry original Voter ID OR valid Govt ID (Aadhaar, PAN, Passport).
guide_vote_step_3: Leave mobile phones outside (they are not allowed inside the booth).
guide_mark_calendar: Mark your calendar for the voting day in
bookmarks_subtitle: Keep track of the candidates you want to follow closely before voting day.
no_bookmarks_desc: You haven't saved any candidates. Explore the candidates page and bookmark the ones you care about to keep them handy here!
about_purpose_text: VoteWise Elite is a next-generation civic-tech platform designed to empower citizens with transparent, accessible, and AI-driven election information. Our mission is to bridge the gap between complex election data and voter understanding.
about_tech_stack_text: Built with modern technologies including Next.js 15, React 19, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion for a fluid, premium experience.
eligibility_subtitle: Answer a few questions to see if you can vote in the upcoming elections.
q_id: Do you have a valid ID proof?
why_text: To vote in India, you must be a citizen of India, at least 18 years old on the qualifying date, and registered in the electoral roll of your constituency.
voter_id_desc: A step-by-step guide to applying for your first Voter ID card in India.
voter_id_step1_desc: Go to the official Voters' Service Portal (voters.eci.gov.in) which is the single window for all voter services.
voter_id_step2_desc: Register as a new voter by filling out Form 6. You will need to provide personal details and your constituency.
voter_id_step3_desc: You need to upload: 1. A recent passport-size photo, 2. Age Proof (Aadhaar/PAN), 3. Address Proof.
voter_id_step4_desc: Review your details carefully and submit the application. You will receive a reference ID for tracking.
voter_id_step5_desc: Use your reference ID on the portal to track your application status until your Voter ID is issued.
live_results_desc: Real-time vote counting and analytics for the 2026 Elections.
myth_fact_desc: Don't fall for fake news. Click to reveal the truth.
myth1_q: I can vote online using an app.
myth1_a: False. There is NO online voting in India. You must physically visit your designated polling station and vote using an Electronic Voting Machine (EVM).
myth2_q: If I don't have my Voter ID card, I cannot vote.
myth2_a: False. If your name is on the electoral roll, you can use other approved IDs like an Aadhaar Card, Passport, or PAN Card.
myth3_q: EVMs can be easily hacked via Bluetooth.
myth3_a: False. EVMs are standalone machines with no wireless communication capabilities (no WiFi, Bluetooth, or internet).
myth4_q: I can vote in my hometown even if I live in another state.
myth4_a: False. You can only vote in the constituency where you ordinarily reside. If you moved, you must transfer your vote using Form 8.
timeline_subtitle: Keep track of the most important dates for the upcoming elections.
desc_notification: Official notification for State Assembly Elections in Tamil Nadu.
desc_nominations: Candidates must submit their Form 26 and affidavits.
desc_campaigning: Silence period begins 48 hours before polling.
desc_voting: Polling across 234 constituencies in Tamil Nadu from 7 AM to 6 PM.
desc_counting: Results declaration by the Election Commission of India (ECI).
faq_center_desc: Common questions about elections, voting, and our platform.
faq1_a: NOTA stands for 'None of the Above'. It's an option on the EVM that allows you to officially register your rejection of all contesting candidates.
faq2_q: How do I check if my name is on the voter list?
faq2_a: You can search for your name on the electoral roll through the NVSP portal (electoralsearch.in) using your details or EPIC number.
faq3_a: A manifesto is a published document where a political party or candidate outlines their motives, policies, and promises if elected.
faq4_q: Is this platform affiliated with the government?
faq4_a: No, VoteWise Elite is an independent civic-tech platform designed to educate and assist voters. We are not affiliated with the ECI.
reg_to_vote_desc: Complete this simple checklist to get your Voter ID card.
reg_step_1: Ensure you are an Indian citizen aged 18 or above.
reg_step_2: Keep your Aadhaar Card, Passport, or Utility Bill ready for Address Proof.
reg_step_3: Keep a recent passport-size photograph ready.
reg_step_4: Visit the official NVSP Portal and fill out Form 6.
first_time_voter_desc: Everything you need to know before you press the button on the EVM.
ftv_step1_desc: You can't vote without being on the electoral roll. Use our interactive guide to learn how to register using Form 6.
ftv_rule_1: Do not wear political party colors or symbols to the booth.
ftv_rule_2: Mobile phones are strictly prohibited inside the voting booth.
ftv_rule_3: Your vote is a secret. You don't have to tell anyone who you voted for.
ftv_step3_desc: Don't vote based on WhatsApp forwards. Use our Candidate Explorer to read summarized, unbiased manifestos.
contact_support_desc: Have questions or feedback? Send us a message.
message_sent_desc: Thank you for reaching out. Your feedback has been saved locally.
visit_us_desc: Find the central Election Commission office below (Google Maps Integrated).
accessibility_subtitle: We believe democracy is for everyone. Here is how we make our platform accessible.
contrast_desc: Toggle between light and dark themes using the sun/moon icon in the navigation bar. Our color palette is designed to meet WCAG contrast guidelines.
typography_desc: We use large, legible fonts that respond seamlessly to your browser's default font size settings. No small print.
screen_reader_desc: Images include alt text, and interactive elements use proper semantic HTML tags (like buttons and links) to ensure compatibility with screen readers.
privacy_sec1_desc: VoteWise Elite is designed to operate entirely locally within your browser. We do not have a backend database, and we do not transmit any of your personal data (like your state selection, voter type, or bookmarks) to any external servers.
privacy_sec2_desc: We use your browser's local storage to save your progress in the Interactive Guide and to store your bookmarked candidates. This data remains on your device and can be cleared at any time by clearing your browser cache.
privacy_sec3_desc: Our platform may contain links to official government websites (like the NVSP portal). We are not responsible for the privacy practices of these external sites.
privacy_sec4_desc: The AI Assistant logic runs completely on the frontend using pre-defined local datasets. No chat logs are sent to external APIs or stored anywhere other than your active browser session.
terms_sec1_desc: VoteWise Elite is an educational platform. For official information, always refer to the Election Commission of India (ECI) website.
terms_sec2_desc: Permission is granted to use this app for personal, non-commercial informational purposes only.
